description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly yellow upper and white accents, including a white midsole and signature side stripes. The shoe features a lace-up closure with yellow laces and a padded tongue, providing comfort and support. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic fabric and possibly suede overlays, with visible stitching along the edges. The outsole is white and slightly textured, designed for urban walking or casual sports activities. Branding elements are present on the side and tongue, with a rectangular label and a logo. The overall design is streamlined and modern, suitable for everyday wear in urban environments.
description: A yellow and white low-top athletic sneaker with lace-up closure, side branding, and a white textured sole, designed for urban casual use.
description_view_0: Side view showing yellow upper, white side stripes, and visible branding label.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, yellow laces, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar yellow and white color scheme and side detailing.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel counter and white midsole wrapping around the back.
attribute_logo: Rectangular Reebok logo on the side and a logo on the tongue, both in white.
